reference: I read your question carefully, and I understand your concern. Regarding your first question, yes, it is normal to wait for a week or so; it doesn't significantly affect the tumor's progression while careful planning can improve the outcome. As for your second question, it is a difficult one to answer. There are many types of brain tumors, some more aggressive and some less. Each type carries a different prognosis, which will be better determined after the surgery and the biopsy results. I hope everything works out for the best.
text: I need to question you, and I understand this is a question. Verifying your first question: Yes, it is only the way you are interested in. The presence of a person that you have never met and will never meet. As for your second question, it is a different case. There are many types of people: some more aggressive and selfless. Each type has its own problems. We need better communication. I hope everything works out for us.
